# Third-Party Bridge Integration Applications

Status of each bridge integration:

| Bridge | Application URL | Status | What We Need From Them |
|--------|----------------|--------|----------------------|
| Wormhole | https://wormhole.com/contact | Not Applied | Guardian support for Dina chain |
| LayerZero | https://layerzero.network/build | Not Applied | Endpoint deployment on Dina |
| Axelar | https://axelar.network/ecosystem | Not Applied | Gateway deployment on Dina |
| Across | https://across.to/ecosystem | Not Applied | Spoke pool for Dina |
| Stargate | https://stargate.finance | Not Applied | Pool listing for Dina |
| Circle CCTP | https://www.circle.com/partnerships | Not Applied | Native USDC + CCTP |

## What's Ready On Our Side
- All bridge contracts deployed on Dina testnet
- SDK support (dina-js)
- Documentation at dina-developer-portal.web.app
- 3 validators running with 100ms finality
